feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: PM order: How to hide the tab 'Enhancement' in Operations in IW32?
entry.content:
Hello, 

Is there a way to hide this tab: transaction iw32 -> operations -> Enhancement

I know that there is a user-exit to add/remove this tab on the header level (IWO10018), but i can't find anything to change it on operations level. Do you have any suggestions?

entry.title: Restrict the creation of notification for specific PM order type
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

For Preventive Maintenance orders, Order is creating without notifications. But users can able to create the notification manually for the preventive maintenance orders also. Is there any standard configuration available to restrict the user from the creation of notification for Preventive maintenance order type only.

I removed the notification field in the field selection of the specific order type. Still create icon is available and user are able to create notification for the Preventive orders by clicking create icon.

entry.title: Is GMPS status mandatory for Work Order settlement if there are no operation confirmations?
entry.content:
Hi,

I read in one of the articles that GMPS status in Work Order does not appear upon upgrading to S/4HANA 2020 onwards from 1909 version.
I recently encountered this scenario having to worked both the 1909 and 2022 versions at two different clients and was surprised to see that all Orders in 1909 version had GMPS status when goods were issued against Order. At other client who moved onto S/4 HANA 2022 version, the GMPS status was not appearing for any Order since their upgrade from 1909. 

My concern: I am not able to settle any order in 2022 version using tcode KO88 for Order against which issuance has been made (Movement Type 261) and its status doesn't have GMPS in it.

Upon running KO88 for same Order it says that "there is nothing to settle or already settled", though i made issuance against same order.

Now my question is whether GMPS status is mandatory for Work Orders to be settled? Also how to get this status?

Regards

Faisal

entry.title: Need a mock interview for sap plant maintenance module. Where can I be interviewed?
entry.content:
Need a mock interview for sap plant maintenance module. Where can I be interviewed?

Can someone send me link for my one on one mock interview? It would be great if someone replies

entry.title: Send to spool any ty of GOS attachment (ABAP)
entry.content:
Hello guys.

I've been searching for a week in forums for some way to send to spool GOS attachments(xlsx, pdf, txt, jpg) using ABAP code. Nothing works well. 

I have a PM order with some attachments. I need to print these documents at once. 

Any suggests?

entry.title: Interview questions & interview preparation tips for SAP plant maintenance module.
entry.content:
Interview questions & interview preparation tips for SAP plant maintenance module. Can someone tell me where can I find the interview questions & how to prepare for SAP plant maintenace functional consultant interview.

I am involved as a core team member in implementation of SAP S/4 hana plant maintenance module. I have knowledge of SAP PM configuration. Need to attend a mock interview. Please give me tips & tricks for going into SAP world.

entry.title: IW21 new tab at item screen
entry.content:
Dear SCN,

Is it possible to create a new tab at item screen level ?

New fields added to QMFE (append structure)

Thanks.

Regards,

Maria João Rocha

entry.title: SAP PM Error-'Status Profile not allowed with Object type' while creating an order
entry.content:
While trying to create a work order using IW31, there is an error which prevents me

 'Status Profile X not allowed with Object type Y'

How do I resolve this? Any configuration change required?

@SAPSupport  @palhota @sumitkumar11273

entry.title: Printout from IW38/IW3D is square box with X inside
entry.content:
Hi,

I hope someone may help me please. Our user can print fine in IW32 but whenever she tries to print in IW3D or IW38, the printout comes out as boxes with X inside. When I try to print at my end in IW3D or IW38 using the same user ID and Maintenance Orders, it prints correctly. Please help me. Where can I check further? Thank you.

Regards,

LMO

entry.title: Email Notification after Screening Maintenance Request
entry.content:
Dear,

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition for Asset Management, there is the following request: in the screening phase, while in the "Screen Maintenance Request" tile, we can accept/reject a maintenance request (Y1) > since there is no existing workflow for notifications, how can we alert (sending an email) the technician to say if a maintenance request has been accepted/rejected? Creating a custom output item?

If there is an existing solution, can you please elaborate?

I have a reference here: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/how-to-set-up-the-email-notification-for-flexible-workflow-in-sap-s-4hana/ba-p/13524492 but as stipulated, this is for a workflow.

 

Thank you very much,

 

Dany R.

entry.title: What are the advantages & disadvantages of making an equipment as Functional location in SAP PM
entry.content: What are the advantages & disadvantages of making an equipment as Functional location and vice versa in SAP plant maintenance?

entry.title: What is overall equipment effectiveness
entry.content:
What is the meaning of overall equipment effectiveness in sap plant maintenance?

 

How it is useful?

entry.title: What is serialisation in equipment & functional location in SAP pm
entry.content:
What is the meaning of serialisation of equipment & functional location?

Can the serialisation of functional location be done?

entry.title: Can we mass upload the Locations?
entry.content:
Can we mass upload the locations?

I am talking about the locations which will be created through the path SPRO- SIMG- Enterprise Structure- Definition- Logistic general- Define location and new entries.

Can we mass upload this locations? Because I have a huge number of locations to be created.

Please help.

entry.title: BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN - CREATED RESERVATION
entry.content:
hello experts! I try to create Order in RFC use bapi BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN. it's successfully created but i have problem in reservation. 
I found a problem in the order details, when I checked Components -> General Data -> Reservation Details there was a difference in MovementType as in the picture below.
Why does this happen?
for movementType that complies with the company's rules in Y19, why in the source stored data table is MvTp 261? what should i do?

note: in it_component when use BAPI, I did not enter the reservation number (RESERV_NO). the system/bapi created it automatically.

The suggestions or answers you gave really helped me. Thanks A lot!

entry.title: Mass Change Equipment User Status using Master Data Info. center Fiori tile - Error
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

When trying to mass change the user status of equipment using the "Master Data Information Center" Fiori tile, bellow error message appears. 

"Status is not user status"

The list contained only 5 equipment which are having the initial status of "INIT" and intended to change to next status "INSE". (list does not contain any Functional locations)

Following is the user status profile and it does not contain any dependencies,

Any possible reason for the error message (message itself is not helpful - no error details or ID)

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Manage work center capacity for maintenance order
entry.content:
Dear,

When implementing SAP Asset Management S/4HANA Public Edition for a client, one of the requests is the following: being able to check the capacities available of a work center before assigning hours to an operation.

I know that there is the Work Center Utilization app via the license Resource Scheduling (43R) but we want to know if there is an equivalent to check the capacities without this license.

I have found a Production tile: Manage Work Center Capacity. I have defined, in My Area Of Responsibility, a work center group that I have created by including my maintenance work center in it.

The issue that I have is that I do not see the percentage of the utilization of my maintenance operations, yet I cannot see the work planned (see my pictures attached) > the utilization is empty for my work center RES-0100; Capacities are available in the header of my work center & my maintenance order operations are either ready to schedule or dispatched already.

Can you please help and let me know if there is a configuration missing or another alternative to check capacity planning without the Resource Scheduling app?

Thank you,

Dany R.

entry.title: Enable maintenance order scheduled start and scheduled finish date
entry.content:
We need to enable scheduled start and scheduled finish date in maintenance order so that user can maintain the required scheduled start and scheduled finish date. Standard sap system is not allowing to change the scheduled start and end date. Please provide the appropriate solution to maintain the Scheduled dates in maintenance order.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: development, quality, production -- these are called servers or landscapes or environment?
entry.content:
development, quality, production -- these are called servers or landscapes or environment?

Some call them as servers, some call them as systems, some call them as landscapes, some call them as environment.

What exactly these are? Servers? Systems? Landscapes? or Environment?

entry.title: Fleet Management SAP PM - two fuel cards
entry.content:
Dear all,

for all vehicles created as equipment we might need to add a second fuel card. Is there any possiblity to do so? If not, could you suggest maybe a good way to meet this requirement.

Thanks a lot,

Sunnyi
